## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Raze Growth and GrowthX for web development and AI-powered tools.](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to develop multiple web properties and AI-powered tools to showcase capabilities and drive organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Raze Growth demonstrated rapid prototyping skills, creating a sample landing page for "The Output" within hours](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in a one-month trial project to assess fit and explore fast-paced development of tools and web properties](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [GrowthX has various API-powered workflows that could be transformed into public-facing tools with proper UI/UX](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Topics

### Raze Growth's Capabilities

  - [Rapid prototyping: Created "The Output" landing page within 3-4 hours based on GrowthX's brief](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Strong focus on SEO optimization and page speed scores](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Experience with B2B websites, UX design, and app design](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Ability to create templatized, AI-powered component libraries for marketing websites](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### GrowthX's Vision and Projects

  - [Developing multiple web properties: GrowthX site, AI-led growth community, and potentially "The Output"](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Creating public-facing tools powered by existing API workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Leveraging programmatic SEO to drive organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Exploring micro-apps and exposing workflows via API](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Building and beautifying AI-powered tools (e.g., transcription, YouTube video processing)](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Developing a community platform (ai-led-growth.com)](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Creating a content-focused platform (potentially "The Output")](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Implementing programmatic SEO strategies to boost organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Working Relationship

  - [Proposed one-month trial project to assess fit and explore fast-paced development](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Potential for full-time engagement if trial is successful](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide access to existing APIs and engineering support](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to regroup and discuss specifics of the one-month trial project](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
  - [Jason to follow up with details on the proposed engagement](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2809.0)
  - [Add Raze Growth team to GrowthX Slack for direct communication](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2885.0)
  - [Determine project scope, including community platform and 2-3 AI-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
  - [Discuss technical details and integration with GrowthX's engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/9PxrrUSLxou9_TMA_ELcvRPH2TrQeS-J?tab=summary&timestamp=2807.0)
